suggestions.replacement: subTitle: Les Staff Engineers détestent ça !
suggestions.reason: The subtitle was left empty in the translation but contains a classic 'clickbait' trope in the English source that should be preserved for tone consistency.

suggestions.match: fork-le et construis ton propre service de données KV !
suggestions.replacement: forkez-le et construisez votre propre service de données KV !
suggestions.reason: The rest of the article uses 'vous' (formal/plural) to address the reader. Switching to 'tu' in the final call to action is inconsistent.

rationale: The translation is technically sound and captures the informal, punchy style of the original. The previous judge's suggestions regarding 'encodage' and 'évoluer' were already integrated into the current file version. I am adding a fix for the missing subtitle and an inconsistency in the person (tu vs vous) used in the call to action.

suggestionLog.replacement: subTitle: Les Staff Engineers détestent ça !
suggestionLog.reason: The subtitle was missing in the candidate but present in the English source.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.match: La hiérarchie des clés (`user/420` -> `user/420/friends`) encodage naturel d'une relation graphique
suggestionLog.replacement: La hiérarchie des clés (`user/420` -> `user/420/friends`) encode naturellement une relation de graphe
suggestionLog.reason: The original sentence 'encodage naturel' is ungrammatical (missing verb). 'Relation de graphe' is more standard than 'relation graphique' in this technical context.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.match: l'évoluer vers un système plus complexe
suggestionLog.replacement: le faire évoluer vers un système plus complexe
suggestionLog.reason: In French, 'évoluer' is intransitive; you cannot 'évoluer' something directly. 'Le faire évoluer' is the correct transitive construction.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
